infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Mira needs camera access for photo verification and taking profile photos.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Mira needs photo library access to upload profile photos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Mira needs microphone access for video recording.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Mira uses your location to show people near you.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Use Face ID for secure login.

plugins.cameraPermission: Allow Mira to access your camera for photo verification.
plugins.microphonePermission: Allow Mira to record audio for video messages.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Mira to access your photos for sending secure media.
plugins.savePhotosPermission: Allow Mira to save photos to your gallery.

plugins.photosPermission: Allow Mira to access your photos for your profile.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Mira to use your location to show people near you while you're using the app.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Mira may use location in the background ONLY for Background Crossed Paths, and only after you explicitly turn it on. You can disable it anytime in Nearby Settings.
